productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Twenty2yds Lite IV Sports Shoes
description: adidas created this Twenty2yds Lite IV shoe to appeal to all serious cricket players. The interesting upper, styled to look sleek and sophisticated, ensures maximum comfort while on the field. The key features of the shoe are its light weight and lowness to the ground. Tooling of the shoe ensures maximum stability, reinforced by the spike configuration and plastic lugs for a solid foot plant position while facing those fast deliveries. Needless to say, this product has been endorsed by the master blaster Sachin Tendulkar. Upper Redesigned ClimaCool mesh upper allow your feet to breathe while also providing protection against dust adiPrene+ in the forefoot offer great impact cushioning and durability Lateral and medial pro moderator to add great stability Synthetic leather overlays stitched to the backfoot for good shoe structure Central lace ups Meshed and padded tongue Padded sockliner which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Low foot bed and a wider midfoot for maximum stability Midsole 3D torsion in the midsole and adiPrene inserts in the heel Outsole Rubber traxion outsole, has full spike configuration with plastic lugs added in the box for customisation option Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
